name: pgas-new
description: PGAS-specific foundry for creating TypeScript/Node PGAS programs

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:manifest && npm run test:unit && npm run test:static
scripts.test:live-graduation: PGAS_REQUIRE_LIVE=1 PGAS_LIVE_GRADUATION=1 PGAS_LIVE_SYNTH=1 vitest run --config tests/vitest.config.ts tests/integration/foundry-live-graduation.test.ts tests/integration/domain-synthesis-live.test.ts
